mapper.select: SELECT id, username, score, ip_address, played_at FROM tetris_scores ORDER BY score DESC LIMIT #{limit}
SELECT id, username, score, ip_address, played_at FROM tetris_scores WHERE LOWER(username) = LOWER(#{username}) LIMIT 1
SELECT id, username, score, ip_address, played_at FROM tetris_scores WHERE ip_address = #{ipAddress} LIMIT 1
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO tetris_scores (username, score, ip_address, played_at) VALUES (#{username}, #{score}, #{ipAddress}, now())
mapper.update: UPDATE tetris_scores SET score = #{score}, played_at = now() WHERE id = #{id}
